helpful: The complete provisioned petition exposed the interlocutory posture and fact-bound framing.
Fee-class and docket-stage base rates materially improved calibration.
CourtListener searches confirmed the controlling finality and mootness doctrines.
gaps: The committed statpack did not include the salience-band table described in the prediction prompt.
Citation-field searches produced noisy prefix matches, requiring exact case-name searches.
notes: Structured corpus filters do not carry a useful subject field for SCOTUS cert petitions, so no corpus-prior query was made.
